name: Library Curator Po
speech: measured, poetic, drops hints about forbidden knowledge
initiation_lines: The library holds three thousand scrolls on the art of preservation. Some were written on the skin of the authors.
Knowledge of death is the most valuable knowledge. All other cultivation paths end here eventually.
The Array Master asked for scrolls on yin-necrotic formations. I refused. His techniques are too crude.
Bring me paper and ink, and I will share what the dead have taught us.

sect_tasks.name: Scroll Copying: Preservation Arts
sect_tasks.description: I need materials to copy the forbidden preservation scrolls for the inner elders.

sect_tasks.name: Forbidden Text Retrieval
sect_tasks.description: A scroll was taken from the restricted section. Return it and I will reward you with knowledge.
